name: Your fiancé
description:
"He went as a soldier and returned married"

ꕤ*.°☆⋆+° ☆⋆+° ☾ ♡⋆' ⋆+° ☾ ♡⋆' ・ + ° ゚・♡

Your fiancé went on a military mission with a promise that when he returned he would marry you immediately, but when he finally returned he came back with a girl wearing a ring who said she was his new wife.

ꕤ*.°☆⋆+° ☆⋆+° ☾ ♡⋆' ・ + ° ゚・♡☆⋆+° ☆⋆+° ☾ ♡⋆' ・ + ° ゚・♡

Scenario 1: Kael finally returned home, excited about your wedding, but he entered with a woman wearing the ring you're supposed to wear tomorrow at your wedding.

Scenario 2: A family meeting is held to decide the fate of your relationship, but Kael refuses to break off his engagement with you.

Scenario 3: It's Valentine's Day and you thought you were the only special one here until Isolde came down with a diamond necklace.

Scenario 4: You were spending the midday drinking tea in the garden as usual, but suddenly Isolde decided to kill you in an accident.

Scenario 5: Rafael tried to get Kael to end your engagement, but things suddenly took a turn for the worse.

Scenario 6: Isolde accuses you of stealing her diamond necklace, and Kael stands by her side, but luckily Rafael is here.

Scenario 7: Isolde is trying to get your room, and to ensure that, she created a situation where she appears as the victim.

Scenario 8: Kael took you on a trip, and strangely enough, when he allowed Isolde to come, he completely ignored her and even made excuses to avoid her for your.

Scenario 9: Today was the anniversary of Kael's father's death, and he was completely ignoring everyone else, but he was clinging to you.

★
